title: How a man of God becomes worth marrying
caption:
The man chasing God always ends up where the right woman is.

Most guys are trying to attract a godly woman while they're still running the desperation play — checking her out on social, running three versions of themselves depending on the room, using romance to fill what Scripture is supposed to fill. She can tell. The right woman can always tell.

A wife won't fix your loneliness. She'll just live inside it with you. Deal with the wound before you drag it into a covenant.

Get your standard from the Word, not your wound. "Charm is deceitful, and beauty is vain, but a woman who fears the Lord is to be praised." — Proverbs 31:30. That filter only makes sense to a man who's already living the same standard.

Every early morning, every sin you put to death, every time you kept your word when no one was watching — it's forming the man who's actually ready. Do the work because you're in Christ. Trust Him with the rest.

The goal is godliness. The byproduct might be her.

—

Comment "worthy" and I'll send you the link.

#faith #godlymen #manofgod #christianmen #christianity #scripture #discipline #vision #purity
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
